title: SafeZone
description: The SafeZone plugin lets you create protected areas where players are safe. Use /sz to view commands and mark zones with an axe, similar to WorldEdit.
body:
SafeZone is a lightweight and easy-to-use plugin that allows you to create protected areas on your server. With the /sz command, you can view all available commands and manage your SafeZones quickly. The plugin also includes a selection tool similar to WorldEdit — simply use the provided axe to mark two positions and define a SafeZone.

Inside SafeZones, players are protected from PvP, damage, explosions, and other harmful interactions. This makes SafeZone perfect for spawn areas, shops, events, or any place where players should feel safe. The plugin is simple, customizable, and designed to improve your server experience.
